name: La Casa de los Famosos México
original_name: La Casa de los Famosos México
overview: Different celebrities live in the same house watched by cameras 24 hours a day. They will have to overcome tests, strategize and eliminate each other so that only one can be the winner of the most famous house in Mexico.

trailers.title: Wendy Guevara no confiaba en nadie, ¿de quién hay que cuidarse? | La Casa de los Famosos México
